-  kCMVideoCodecType_AppleProResRAW 

Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_AppleProResRAW

A type that identifies the Apple ProRes RAW format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_AppleProResRAW: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
